warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
Warm Up
10 Scap Push Ups
10 scap Pull ups
10 x Inch Worms
10 I-Y-T-W
Wrist Mobilisation
30 Sec KB Ankle rocks

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
EMOM x 10
Odd - 2-4 Bar Muscle Ups
Even - 8-10 Alternating Pistols or alternative scaled version.

gymnastics:
EMOM x 4
30 sec Hollow Hold
Pistols
EMOM x 10 mins
Odd Minutes
5 Box Pistols (slow and controlled)
Even MInutes
20 Second Pistol Holds (each leg)
OR Gymnastics squat hold
EMOM x 5
5 Eccentric Lower
Two Leg stand Up
EMOM x 5
Counterbalance Pistols - Small Plate
Bar muscle up
EMOM X 4
Beat Swing x 10
- think Knuckles over the bar
Bigger Beat swing - Push down to rise up!!
Floor Arch Turn Over
Low bar transition from box
- False grip + Long arms. - move box away to make it harder
Banded BMU OR BMU

hypertrophy.reasoning: Upper body pulling muscles were minimally taxed; horizontal pulling balances pressing/gymnastics volume and prevents imbalances.
